seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Neerdie and Nelly Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Neerdie vs Nelly Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Neerdie and Nelly Bay.
heading: Neerdie vs Nelly Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Neerdie, Queensland and Nelly Bay, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nelly Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Neerdie (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Neerdie or Nelly Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Neerdie has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Nelly Bay scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Neerdie scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Nelly Bay scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Neerdie or Nelly Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nelly Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
